text.title: Retainer vs Project Rubric Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping rubric inputs (dimension count, evidence completeness, aggregate score) to score / publish / reject / calibrate.

conclusion.verdict: reject; rubric must have 4-7 named dimensions; subjective overall forbidden
reject; re-score with evidence anchor per dimension (brief section, transcript, P&L line)

branch.question: two reviewers within 1 point on every dimension?

conclusion.verdict: calibration: reconcile differences > 1 point with reconciliation log; defer to founder if unresolved
recommendation=hybrid; propose retainer base + project top-ups

text.example: 5 dimensions → evidence on all → reviewers within 1 pt → aggregate 18 → hybrid.
